# Summary
<!-- What does this PR change? Keep it short and concrete. -->

## Scope
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests

## UI/UX Guardrails
- [ ] UI matches `docs/ui/UX_SPEC.md`
- [ ] Routes match `docs/ui/NAVIGATION.md` (no new routes without doc update)
- [ ] Status rendering uses `StatusPill` everywhere
- [ ] Responsive + light/dark verified

## Execution tracking (required)
- [ ] Updated `docs/PLAN.md` (Implemented/In progress/Remaining)
- [ ] Updated `docs/TEST_MATRIX.md` (added tests and/or recorded results)

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if setup/env/scripts/ports changed
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Testing
- [ ] Manual smoke tests executed (recorded in `docs/TEST_MATRIX.md`)
- [ ] Lint/typecheck/build pass
